title: FireAngel SB1-R Smoke Alarm - Toast Proof, Optical Smoke Alarms for Home with Replaceable Battery and Test/Silence Button - Early Smoke Detector Fire Alarm - 90 x 35 mm - White
features: EARLY WARNING SMOKE DETECTOR: The optical smoke alarm makes protecting your home simple. The optical smoke sensing chamber works by 'seeing' smoke as it enters the alarm, perfect for slow burning fires with thick white smoke.
TOAST PROOF: The high performance optical sensors ensure the FireAngel SB1-R is less prone to false alarms from cooking fumes, so you can enjoy your breakfast in peace.

TEST/HUSH BUTTON: Press the large test button to ensure your Fire Angel smoke alarm is working properly. A loud, high-pitched sound will verify it. To silence a false alarm, press and hold the button for 5 seconds.

1 YEAR BATTERY: Each battery operated smoke alarm comes with a 1 year, replaceable 9V battery. When the smoke alarm battery is low, the device will 'chirp' and the red LED will flash once every 32 seconds. Replace the battery ASAP.

EASY INSTALLATION: Each FireAngel smoke alarm comes with a removable base plate. Attach the base plate to the ceiling using the screws provided. After inserting the battery, push and twist the alarm clockwise onto the base plate.

SAFETY ASSURED: The SB1-R alarm holds both CE and UKCA marks and has been certified to BS EN14604:2005. Suitable for domestic properties including mobile homes and caravans. Not suitable for commercial properties. Includes a 3-year warranty.

FIREANGEL HOME PROTECTION: In addition to our smoke alarms, we offer a wide range of other safety products designed to protect you and your family. Choose from smart and wireless devices, as well as standard carbon monoxide and heat alarms.
description: From the manufacturer Fire Safety At FireAngel, we're dedicated to protecting and improving our customers’ lives by creating innovative, cutting-edge fire safety technology that is both practical and accessible. The FireAngel Toast Proof Smoke Alarm has been designed to make protecting your home simple, with an easy installation process, fewer false alarms, and rigorous testing. OPTICAL SENSOR: The SB1-R’s optical smoke sensing chamber works by 'seeing' smoke as it enters the alarm, perfect for slow burning fires with thick white smoke. TOAST PROOF: The high performance optical sensor ensures the SB1-R is less prone to false alarms from cooking fumes so you can enjoy your breakfast in peace. Like other smoke alarms, they can be subject to nuisance alarms from steam and should not be placed near bathrooms. To detect fires in your kitchen, see our range of heat alarms. 1-YEAR BATTERY: Each battery-powered smoke alarm includes a 1-year replaceable battery. When the battery is low, the device will alert you with a 'chirp' and the red LED will flash once every 32 seconds. For 10-year smoke alarms, see the FireAngel FA6620-R Optical Smoke Alarm with a 10-year lifetime battery. SUITABLE FOR DOMESTIC PREMISES ONLY: Suitable for domestic properties, including mobile homes and caravans. Not suitable for commercial properties. FireAngel: Smarter solutions for safer homes. Early Warning System Smoke alarms provide an essential early warning system for potential house fires. We recommend smoke alarms are fitted in all rooms where the temperature is between 0°C (32°F) and 40°C (104°F). The SB1-R alarm holds both CE & UKCA marks and is certified to BS EN14604:2005. Sleep Easy To test your device, press the large test button for 5 seconds. A loud, high-pitched sound will verify that the alarm is functioning correctly. In a known false alarm, press and hold the test button for 5 seconds to temporarily silence the alarm for 8 minutes. Safety Guidelines The SB1-R is suitable for the landing, hallway, bedroom, living room and dining room. Smoke alarms should be sited at least 300 mm from light fittings and walls, and ideally as central as possible in the room. If you position your smoke alarm on the wall, the top of the detection element must be between 150 and 300 mm below the ceiling and at least 300 mm from any neighbouring wall. Sensor Type Optical Battery Type 9V DC Replaceable 1 Year Zinc Carbon Battery Dimensions 90 x 35 mm Supply Voltage 9V DC Technology Optical Alarm Sound Level 85dB(A) 3 m (minimum) Installation Positions Wall/Ceiling Operating Temperature 0°C to +40°C Operating Humidity 30% to 90% RH non-condensing Weight 113 g Certified to EN14604:2005+AC:2008 Safety First What should I do if my smoke alarm sounds? In the event of a smoke alarm sounding: STAY CALM: Don’t panic, take immediate action to ensure your own safety and that of others. CHECK FOR SMOKE OR FIRE: Look for visible smoke or flames. If you see either, evacuate immediately. EVACUATE: Leave the premises as quickly as possible using the nearest exit. Do not use lifts. Take the stairs. Ensure everyone is accounted for and exits safely. CLOSE THE DOORS: Close doors behind you as you leave to slow the spread of smoke. CALL 999: Once outside, call the emergency services, providing the operator with your location and any details about the fire. DO NOT RE-ENTER: Do not go back into the building until it has been declared safe by the fire service. About Us We pride ourselves on product reliability and quality. Since 1998, we’ve deployed over 80 million safety products, protecting over 25 million homes nationwide. Sustainability We’re committed to reducing our impact on the planet; that’s why we've reduced the plastic in our packaging and have unique products that use less energy. The FireAngel range In addition to our smoke alarms for the home, we offer a wide range of other safety products designed to protect you and your family. Choose from smart and wireless devices, as well as standard fire, carbon monoxide (CO), and heat alarms.
